subcodes.first_line: O thou intimate companion of ‘Abdu'l-Baha! I perused your letter to His Honor Manshadi and noted its contents.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای همدم عبدالبهاء نامه مرقوم بجناب منشادی ملاحظه گردید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @essential distinction of Manifestation of God from others, @station of the Manifestation of God
